Dr. Lalit Purohit Designation: Professor & Dean (ARSD) Employee ID: 9090 Qualification: Ph.D. : 0731-258-2620 : This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. : Detailed Profile About Faculty: Dr. Lalit Purohit is working in the department of IT at SGSITS Indore since May-2002. He has a good research experience of over 12 years. He pursued his Ph.D. from one of the India topmost engineering institute - Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee. He has guided around 60 UG projects, 15 PG Thesis and 02 PhD are under progress. He has contributed to the department and the institute by holding various responsibilities. Presently he is deputed as deputy controller of exams since Dec 2019. Education and Qualification: S. No. Degree Specialization Year University/Board 01 PhD Computer Engineering 2019 IIT Roorkee Work Experience: S.
